=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 1/13/98, Garde Arts Center (New London, CT), 2CDR

This is a great show and includes a rarity. Bob dylan plays organ on "make you feel my love"! 
Good/great sound but there is a small drop out on "cold Irons bound" 
but this is from the master I believe so download on you own risk because i don, 
t have transfer info either.; bittorrent download 08/04 
(closely matching copy by eac was bittorrented 5/05 with same flaw billed CDR>EAC>shn))

volume level fluctuates at the very beginning of d1t1; volume levels fluctuate and drop at d1t3 1:55

CD1

1 Absolutely Sweet Marie, 
2 The Man In Me, 
3 Cold Irons Bound, 
4 Just Like A Woman, 
5 Can't Wait, 
6 Silvio, 
7 Desolation Row, 
8 Tomorrow Is A Long Time

CD2

1 Tangled Up In Blue, 
2 Make You Feel My Love, 
3 Tears Of Rage, 
4 'Til I Fell In Love With You, 
5 Highway 61 Revisited, 
6 My Back Pages, 
7 Love Sick, 
8 Rainy Day Women #12 & 35
